component.name: NyarchScript QT
component.summary: Run system maintenance and installation scripts on Nyarch Linux

description.p: NyarchScript QT is a Kirigami GUI application for running common system maintenance, installation, and tweak scripts on Nyarch Linux without needing to use the terminal directly.
Built with Kirigami for seamless KDE Plasma integration, it provides script categories for Updates, Install, Tweaks, and System Information.
Initial release of NyarchScript QT for KDE Plasma
